summary.lv: Iesaistes mārketinga vadītājs Clarity Labs, kas vada B2B mārketinga aktivitātes sociālajos tīklos un LinkedIn, organizē vebinārus un pasākumus un īsteno klientu aizstāvības un kopienas attīstības programmas (tostarp ar SAP partneriem).
summary.en: Engagement Marketing Manager at Clarity Labs driving B2B marketing execution across social media and LinkedIn, organizing webinars and events, and running customer-advocacy and community-development programs (including with SAP partners).
